productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes White Tshirt
description: Composition White and red panel stitch polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a contrast colour spread collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves in contrast colour, brand applique with print on the left chest, brand applique on the left sleeve and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron only, but do not iron on print Designed to look like a striped polo neck tee, this T-shirt from status quo has panel stitch detailing, which makes it a truely special addition to your wardrobe. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a casual favourite. Team it with jeans and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
